description: Style noteSoft fabric upper with plush nubuck overlays and an unbelievably cushiony sockliner brought together in a firm masculine structure, albeit with feminine design. This versatile newfeel shoe can be worn with casual sport style ensembles, or as a quirky throw-in with dressier pieces! Product DetailsRound toed light pink shoe with synthetic overlays and lace-up fasteningUpper adhered to the outsolePU outsole with grooves all overMaterial and CareFabric, syntheticDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
